aboutBody: This cat comes from a photo that went viral in Japan: a grandma out in the woods to shoot some scenery instead caught a tabby cat sprawled belly-up on the dirt, staring blankly at the sky. People joked it was a real-life “face-plant emoji,” so artful it “wouldn’t look out of place in the Louvre.” We thought that moment of falling was too beautiful not to keep — so we made this game, letting you capture every perfect tumble yourself.
